title: Electricitymeters
description: This mod adds electricitymeters, which can be used to count and pay energie. There are also Emerald pieces, piece pieces, ...
body:
This Mod adds electricitymeters, which are able to count and pay energie which is floating trough. There are also payment methods (emerald pieces, emerald piecpieces, emerald piecepiecepieces). You need to have a mod which has energie tanks and transportation like create with create: new age or mekanism.

construction:





- Place a tank on the ground. There will be the energie output
- Then place the electricitymeter on top
- Place a tank on top. This tank will be the input
- Place a filterblock on top.
- Now put the price for the energie in the filter. For Exmaple: 5 emerald pieces. 10.000 FE will now cost 5 emeraldpieces.
- Now you can build a system where a player can put the payment in a chest or something like that, and then the payment will go into the electricitymeter.
- You can now put energiíe in the upper tank and put a clock signal to the electricitymeter. Every signal energie will be transfered.

Crafting:



emeraldpiece...:

    previous item (emeraldpiece -> emerald)

    in any field.

    back: nine of the pieces in the grid

filter:

    plank         string          plank

    string        air               string

    iron_ingot  string  iron_ingot



filterblock:

    stone = andesit/stone/diorite, NOT cobblestone

    ironblock    stone    ironblock

    stone          filter     stone

   ironblock    stone     ironblock

    = 2 filterblocks



electricitymeter:

    ironingot    filterblock            ironingot

    ironingot    amethystblock    ironingot

    ironingot    redstonedust      ironingot
